name: Oozepick (Greater)
description:
Activate 1 Interact

You can pour this silver ooze into a lock or similar mechanism to create a set of malleable lockpicks and tools that conform to internal mechanisms. The ooze is treated as a set of thieves' tools that last for 8 hours and provide a +3 item bonus to Thievery checks to or against the mechanism into which they were first poured.
